TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kim_Jong-un, title = Kim_Jong-un, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kim_Jong-un} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 1, Kim Jong-un, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1984) mrhuw Korea, north ta' misuw hya' ga Kim Jong-un, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 1, Kim Jong-un, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1984) mrhuw Korea, north ta' misuw hya' ga Kim Jong-un, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, kim *oŋ-un, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw korea, nortħ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa kim *oŋ-un, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
